name: Crab Burgers
keywords: cheese eggs main dish sandwiches seafood
recipeIngredient: 1 packet catsup or BBQ sauce to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mash the eggs and combine them with the crab meat.
2. Add the grated cheddar cheese, diced green onion, mayonnaise, catsup or BBQ sauce to taste, celery salt, onion salt, and garlic powder in a small bowl. Mix well.
3. Combine the two mixtures and stir until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Divide the mixture between two hamburger bun halves.
5. Broil until bubbly or slightly brown.
6. Serve hot.
